root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_security_permit_head.request_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) as request_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_security_permit_head.request_date , 'HH24:MI:SS' ) as request_ttime , sc_security_permit_head.request_remark , sc_security_permit_head.request_id , (select branch_name from sc_com_m_branch where branch_id = sc_security_permit_head.request_branch) as request_branch , sc_security_permit_head.permit_id , sc_security_permit_head.permit_result from sc_security_permit_head where 1=1 and to_tdate(sc_security_permit_head.request_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') between to_tdate('!request_date_1!','yyyy-mm-dd') and to_tdate('!request_date_2!','yyyy-mm-dd') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_security_permit_head.request_date = '31/05/2024' order by sc_security_permit_head.request_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_security_permit_head.request_date , 'HH24:MI:SS' )
